items.title: mknepprath-next
items.summary:
Fix theme updater push and add Photay Appreciation

Use ACTION_GITHUB_TOKEN for checkout so the push can bypass the Vercel
required-status-check on master (enforcement_level: non_admins). The
github-actions bot is a non-admin and has been failing since Apr 25.

Also manually adds the Photay Appreciation theme that was detected on
Apr 25 but never committed due to the push failures.

items.title: lily-dex-api
items.summary:
Identify lily-dex-api in User-Agent for Leek Duck requests

Previously requests went out with no User-Agent. Now they identify
the project with a link back to the repo so the Leek Duck maintainer
can reach out if they want us to adjust anything.

items.title:
I've been building a Pokemon GO companion app called lily dex. It's on the App Store now and I'm pretty happy with where it's at. No ads.

If you play Pokemon GO, give it a look. Would love to hear what you think. apps.apple.com/us/app/lily-...
items.summary:
